title: Six Kids and Their Uncle
writer: John Habberton, Gitte Palsby, Annelise Reenberg

plot: Child psycologist and bachelor, Eric Lund, has written a thesis about the use of psycology in modern parenting. While house sitting for his sitter, he finds himself at the mercy of his sisters six children as he tries to live by t...
